data.title: Dow Jones drops on surprise inflation data; potential Supreme Court ruling on Trump tariffs next.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline due to unexpected inflation data. Investors are now waiting for a potential Supreme Court ruling regarding the Trump tariffs. The market dropped following the release of weak GDP figures. Stay updated on this developing story for live coverage.

data.title: LyondellBasell reduces dividend to 69 cents/share from $1.37 amidst industry challenges; aims to return 70% free cash flow to shareholders.
data.description: LyondellBasell Industries (LYB) has announced a significant dividend reduction, with the quarterly dividend dropping to 69 cents per share from $1.37 per share previously. The new dividend will be payable on March 9, 2026, to shareholders as of March 2, 2026. This decision is part of the company's strategy to adjust its financial commitments due to market challenges. Despite industry downturn, LYB aims to return 70% of its free cash flow to shareholders. The company faced headwinds in 2025, such as trade disruptions, falling oil prices, and capacity additions outweighing global demand growth. In the fourth quarter, LYB reported an adjusted loss per share of 26 cents. The news is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Annual General Meeting of ALK-Abelló A/S scheduled for March 16, 2026, at 4:00 PM CET in Denmark.
data.description: The yearly general assembly of ALK-Abelló A/S (traded as ALKB:DC on Nasdaq Copenhagen as ALK B) will be held on Monday, March 16, 2026, at 4:00 PM (CET) at the company's headquarters: Bøge Allé 1, 2970 Hørsholm, Denmark. The meeting will cover important topics outlined in the agenda, which includes full proposals from the Board of Directors to the Annual General Meeting.

data.title: Safe Pro wins contract to supply U.S. Govt with AI Edge Processing Systems.
data.description: According to recent data, the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3%, which is a decrease from the previous month's rate of 4.7%. This marks the lowest unemployment rate recorded in the past five years. The total number of employed individuals has increased by 250,000, with the majority of the new jobs being created in the service sector. Additionally, the average hourly wage has seen a slight increase of 2.5% compared to last year. Overall, the economic outlook remains positive as the job market continues to show growth and improvement.

data.title: Holladay Distillery partners with Empire Distributors Inc. to expand in CO, GA, and TN. Strengthening presence in key states.
data.description: In Weston, Missouri on February 20, 2026, Holladay Distillery revealed a significant development in their operations. The distillery has secured a valuable multi-state distribution agreement with Empire Distributors Inc. This partnership aims to expand Holladay Distillery's reach in key markets such as Colorado, Georgia, and Tennessee. This collaboration signifies a strategic move by the distillery to enhance its market presence and drive growth.

data.title: Pye-Barker Fire & Safety acquires Universal Fire Systems, a 34-year fire sprinkler specialist in Tampa, Florida, expanding their presence in the state.
data.description: Pye-Barker Fire & Safety, based in Atlanta, announced on February 20, 2026, their acquisition of Universal Fire Systems, a respected fire sprinkler specialist in Tampa, Florida with 34 years of experience. This acquisition will complement Pye-Barker's expanding presence in the state and give them access to Universal Fire Systems' impressive portfolio of commercial projects. This move solidifies Pye-Barker Fire & Safety's position as the leading fully integrated fire protection company in the region.

data.title: Starfighters Space celebrates NYSE American listing on Feb. 20, 2026. NYSE issues daily pre-market update.
data.description: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) releases a pre-market advisory every day from the trading floor. This update is shared directly from the NYSE Trading Floor in New York City. On February 20, 2026, the NYSE issued the daily pre-market update through PRNewswire. Investors can access today's NYSE Pre-market update to gain valuable market insights before the trading day begins. Stay informed with crucial information about stock performance and market trends by following the NYSE's daily pre-market advisories. Make informed investment decisions based on the latest updates provided by the NYSE.

data.title: Stock futures decline as US economy slows, Q4 GDP grows at 1.4%, inflation rises to 2.9%. Dow Jones -0.21%, S&P 500 -0.27%. Dropbox falls 4.16%. Fed likely to keep interest rates unchanged in March. Trump warns Iran of consequences. Bond yields: 10-year at 4.07%, 2-year at 3.47%. (Word count: 56)
data.description: U.S. stock futures fell on Friday after key economic data was released. The economy slowed sharply at the end of 2025, with GDP growing at a 1.4% annualized rate in the fourth quarter, below economists' expectations. Inflation increased with the PCE price index rising to 2.9% in December. President Trump warned Iran to strike a deal on its nuclear program within 10-15 days or face consequences. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.07%, and two-year bond at 3.47%. Market projections show a 94% likelihood of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged in March. Dow Jones, S&P 500, Nasdaq 100, and Russell 2000 indices all declined. The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF were down in premarket trading. Dropbox Inc. fell 4.16% despite posting better-than-expected Q4 earnings. FY2026 sales are forecasted between $2.485 billion to $2.500 billion. Full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Grayscale increases Cardano allocation in its Smart Contract Fund due to Cardano's push into Bitcoin DeFi, bringing external Bitcoin liquidity. Top positions in Fund: Solana, Ethereum, Cardano, Avalanche, Hedera, and Sui. Cardano recently fell out of top 10 cryptocurrencies.
data.description: Grayscale has increased its allocation of Cardano (ADA) in its Smart Contract Fund as the blockchain ventures into Bitcoin DeFi. This move is part of an effort to attract external Bitcoin liquidity onto Cardano through non-custodial collateral and stable coin-based lending. The fund, which includes various smart contract platforms, is currently focused on Solana (SOL) and Ethereum (ETH), with notable positions in Cardano, Avalanche (AVAX), Hedera (HBAR), and Sui (SUI). The rise in ADA allocation aligns with Cardano's intensified efforts in Bitcoin DeFi, coinciding with its drop out of the top 10 cryptocurrencies.

data.title: End of 2025 saw U.S. GDP growth of 1.4% annually, impacted by government shutdown.
data.description: The country's economy saw a growth in gross domestic product by 1.4 percent over the last quarter of the year, impacted by the government shutdown.

data.title: BAE Systems unveils CV9035 MkIV for Slovak Armed Forces in Sweden, Ministers of Defense present.
data.description: In Örnsköldsvik, Sweden, on February 20, 2026, the CV9035 MkIV for the Armed Forces of the Slovak Republic was revealed at a special event held at BAE Systems Hägglunds. The Swedish Minister of Defence, Pål Jonson, greeted the distinguished visitor, the Slovak Minister of Defence, during the ceremonial rollout.

data.title: West Shore Home expands to Huntsville, AL in March, benefiting from rising job growth in aerospace, defense, tech sectors.
data.description: Home improvement company West Shore Home is set to expand its operations to Huntsville, AL, in early March. This move comes as the city experiences significant development in aerospace, defense, and technology sectors, leading to job growth in the area. Huntsville's booming economy and strategic location make it an ideal choice for West Shore Home's new venture.

data.title: Senti Bio joins Cell & Gene Live event showcasing new technologies for cell therapy. Nasdaq: SNTI.
data.description: In South San Francisco on February 20, 2026, Senti Biosciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNTI), a clinical-stage biotechnology firm utilizing its Gene Circuit platform, shared its involvement in a Cell & Gene Live virtual event. This event highlighted cutting-edge technologies for progressing novel cell therapies. Senti Bio is at the forefront of developing next-gen cell and gene therapies.

data.title: Startup aims to lead digital transformation in $500 billion U.S. home repair industry, lagging in tech adoption.
data.description: In Orlando, Florida on February 20, 2026, it was reported that the U.S. home repair and improvement industry, valued at almost $500 billion each year as per Harvard University's Joint Center for Housing Studies, has historically been slower in embracing digital technologies compared to other consumer sectors.

data.description: In Exeter, New Hampshire, on February 20, 2026, DiBona Dental Group revealed plans for its 50th-anniversary festivities scheduled for May 29th. The event commemorates fifty years of providing reliable dental care to families within the New Hampshire Seacoast region.
